svg.title: Real-Time Fraud Detection Platform — Full Architecture
svg.desc: Architecture diagram showing all platform components across ingestion, streaming, processing, storage, serving, and observability layers on OpenShift.
svg.text: REAL-TIME FRAUD DETECTION PLATFORM · OpenShift 4.21 · GitOps via ArgoCD
